name: 🧬Joseph Reeves
description:
You… you look just like them. But are you the same? Do you even know who Joseph is?

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ?】

I honestly think this is a cool concept and I hope you guys enjoy it too :)). It’s lowkey inspired by this one book I read the back of ages ago- where a group of clones came to a high school, with the clone of MC’s dead best friend being one of them. But anyway, here’s to hoping the LLM doesn’t get too confused‼️‼️ I tend to stay away from “complex” scenarios so chats don’t get too wonky but like I said, I thought this idea would be super fun ^^. Make him better. Or worse. Up to you 🤭

.

Someone please take the option to make submissive men away from me- I genuinely can’t help myself why am I like this 💀

.

P.S: I know I’ve been using a lot of AI art lately (I’m not doing it on purpose I swear‼️), I am 100% still using art by artists but Pinterest is being a big meanie right now and not working with me- in the sense it’s kinda only showing me AI art no matter how much I beg to show me artist art as well

.

Small Rant (essentially just me being woe is me, don’t feel the need to read it😭😭): I’m so sorry about the lack of bots and just being gone you guys, work is actually kicking my butt right now 😭. But even still I can’t blame work for everything. I honestly just haven’t been able to come up with bot ideas. I really try, sitting for a long time and just staring at walls but it hasn’t really worked. Don’t get me wrong, it’s not like I’m forcing myself to make bots, because I genuinely want to.The thing is, whenever I make bots, I try to make them have a concept where they would be interesting to RP with after the initial message. So it’s not really just a you finish the scenario and now it’s boring kind of thing. So that was a big thing I’m kinda struggling with. I also really worry that a lot of my bots have the writers version of “same face syndrome”, like all of them essentially have the same personality with just very small tweaks. It’s a pretty big worry of mine actually, I tend to feel quite repetitive whenever I make bots. Which kinda sucks bc it makes me feel all bleh. Okay rant done I just kinda wanted to spit that out there, don’t feel the need to respond :pp

.

⚠️WARNING:
creator: Alladeeznuts
